# BP-128 variant positive: a QueryRowContext result is scanned without a no-rows branch.
lang: go
file: BP-128-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: database-sql-queryrow-context
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

func findEmail(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, id int) (string, error) {
	row := db.QueryRowContext(ctx, "SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?", id)
	var email string
	if err := row.Scan(&email); err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
	return email, nil
}
